title: Canada recalls Briine Pacific Tide sparkling water in Alberta after 355ml cans begin bulging
summary_full: The Government of Canada has recalled Briine Pacific Tide Sparkling Spring Waterin Alberta after some355 ml canswere found to be bulging. The recall has been issued due tonon-harmful microbial contamination (quality or spoilage). Consumers and retailers have been advised not to use, sell, serve or distribute the affected product and to check thetwo affected best-before codes: 01AL2028 and 02AL2028.
